item.title: 2026 Actor Awards: Highlights from the ceremony in Los Angeles as celebrities honoured with emotional tributes
item.description: Here is a full list of the winners.

item.title: Australian billionaire Adrian Portelli reports feeling safer surrounded by missile threats in Dubai than Melbourne
item.description: The high-profile entrepreneur said he’s more worried about food stains than missiles.

item.title: Legendary jockey Pat Hyland dies surrounded by family: ‘Deeply loved to the end’
item.description: The champion became an icon when he achieved one of Australian racing’s most famous feats in front of Prince Charles and Princess Diana.

item.title: Shane Warne’s daughter Summer claims patron poured water over her for dancing at Ed Sheeran concert
item.description: ‘God forbid I stand up at a concert’.

item.title: Mike Smithson: Inside the escalating fight for SA’s undecided voters ahead of election
item.description: There is only 18 days left to campaign for the 2026 SA election as regional seats take a key focus.

item.title: Jackie O’s KIIS FM contract terminated after feud with co-host Kyle Sandilands
item.description: Kyle Sandilands has been suspended for 14 days as his on-air behaviour comes under scrutiny.

item.title: ‘I would walk’: Resurfaced video reveals Jackie O’s early desire to quit show with Kyle Sandilands
item.description: Explosive footage of Jackie O Henderson revealing early signs that she could walk from her $100 million contract has resurfaced. WATCH THE VIDEO

item.title: ATP Challenger tennis players race off court at Fujairah Open after nearby explosions: ‘Get inside’
item.description: Players ‘heard the sounds of jets’ and quickly realised it was ‘not very safe’, as officials plotted escape routes out of the country.

item.title: Home and Away: Iconic WA filming locations revealed for their upcoming episodes filmed in the West
item.description: All the locations revealed: Brax (Stephen Peacocke) and Ricky (Bonnie Sveen) make their highly anticipated return to Home and Away 7.00pm Monday, March 9.

item.title: Aussie heavyweight Justis Huni announces boxing comeback after tragic death of trainer Keri Fui
item.description: The 26-year-old has been sidelined since his trainer suffered a heart attack during their workout and later died.

item.title: Ukrainian Igor Komarav reportedly killed after alleged kidnapping in Bali as dismembered remains found
item.description: The 28-year-old was holidaying with his girlfriend when he was allegedly snatched off the street.

item.title: Former world No.1 Jon Rahm levels damning ‘extortion’ accusation at European Tour
item.description: The two-time major champion has put forward a compromise but the fight looks set to rumble on.

item.title: Small business owners worry work-from-home laws will ‘create divide’ between workers
item.description: ‘Admin staff have the ... right to work from home but the blue-collar workers will have to come in.’

item.title: Labor maintains strong lead as One Nation surges in latest SA polling numbers
item.description: The Roy Morgan poll shows that South Australians are set to re-elect Premier Peter Malinauskas and the Labor Government with an increased majority.

item.title: Aldi lunchbox snack Bubble Bars recalled nationally after black rubber found in rice crispy treats
item.description: Eating the recalled snacks could cause illness or injury, Food Standards Australia said.

item.title: ‘Time is up’: Mounting calls for Medicare rebate to cover longer GP visits which are ‘essential’ for complex care
item.description: Peak health bodies believe the current rebate system unfairly punishes patients with complex needs.

item.title: Legendary broadcaster Bruce McAvaney pays heartbreaking tribute to great friend and ‘ultimate teammate’ Dennis Cometti
item.description: ‘I’ve lost something very precious.’

item.title: Wedding bells ring for Australian favourites Noemie Fox and tennis champion Aryna Sabalenka
item.description: The ‘magical’ scenes have given sporting legends from the around the world ‘goosebumps’.

item.title: Age restrictions loom as e-bike and e-scooter safety recommendations handed down to Queensland government
item.description: Children under 16 are the main target of recommended reforms.

item.title: Photo gallery: All the best looks from the Melbourne Grand Prix’s Glamour on the Grid event
item.description: Jules Neale, AFL stars, and high-profile models have made an eye-catching appearance at the celebrity event.

item.title: Channel 7’s AFL predictions for the 2026 season: Premiers, Brownlow Medal winner, player to watch
item.description: Our expert commentators and award-winning journos are dropping bombs ahead of the AFL season.

item.title: Outback floods: Inland sea cuts off communities as floodwaters cover large parts of central west Queensland
item.description: ‘Road access in and out of these communities is going to take some time to be restored.’

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Former investigator Gerry Thornton opens up about what led to Louis Mahony’s downfall after murder of Lainie Coldwell
item.description: ‘He thought he was invincible.’

item.title: Coalition not scrapping $10k tradie bonus scheme, despite it being ‘inflationary’ and not ‘the answer’
item.description: This is despite the Shadow Minister for Skills calling the scheme ‘inflationary’, ‘wrong’ and ‘not the answer’.

item.title: ‘Put One Nation first’: Pauline Hanson’s party refuses to direct preferences in South Australia election
item.description: The party is projected to win at least one upper house seat in the March election.

item.title: Concerns mount for Matildas star Hayley Raso after second brutal head knock in 4-0 Asian Cup win over Iran
item.description: The distressed veteran left the pitch in tears at the end of a painful night on a personal front.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands considers legal action against ARN over potential sacking after split with Jackie ‘O’ Henderson
item.description: The host is facing accusations of serious misconduct as his longtime partnership with Jackie O ends.

item.title: Donald Trump fires Kristi Noem as homeland security secretary following drama-filled immigration crackdown
item.description: A White House official said the dumping was the result of ‘many unfortunate leadership failures’.

item.title: Sam Kerr makes huge Mary Fowler prediction after drought-breaking Matildas goal against Iran
item.description: ‘She has got age on her side.’

item.title: Grave fears emerge for Iranian players after Asian Cup clash with Matildas: ‘Imminent danger’
item.description: A journalist has sounded the alarm and says the team is facing ‘arbitrary detention and execution’.

item.title: Penny Wong condemns Israeli minister’s plan to flatten Beirut like Gaza, addresses Aussies stuck in Middle East
item.description: Mass evacuations have been ordered in Lebanon’s capital as Israel targets the city with airstrikes.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie reunites with TV colleagues amid search for her missing mother Nancy
item.description: The popular presenter has been on leave since her 84-year-old mother disappeared in a suspected kidnapping.

item.title: Inquiry into racism, hate and violence against First Nations people follows WA terror attack and antisemitism royal commission
item.description: Here’s what we know about the inquiry.

item.title: British police arrest four men on suspicion of spying for Iran on Jewish sites
item.description: The men are suspected of spying on locations and individuals.

item.title: Israel-Iran war: Australians join the conflict as missile attacks continue in the Middle East
item.description: ‘With everything that happened in Bondi, it gave me more motivation to be here.’

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.description: ‘I’m not sure whether the replay is actually the same delivery.’

item.title: Kyle and Jackie O show cancelled: Warning signs the episode was doomed from the start
item.description: The radio hosts have since confirmed their split, with some industry experts saying it had been a long time coming.

item.title: Coach Trent Robinson filthy over penalty count after Warriors spank Sydney Roosters: ‘Quite incredible’
item.description: Trent Robinson had a major issue with the game but has made one thing very clear.

item.title: New Zealander Brendon McCullum set to stay as England coach after Ashes flop
item.description: The New Zealander has been under intense scrutiny but the board is backing their man.

item.title: High Easter egg chocolate prices bite Australians despite falling cocoa costs
item.description: Chocolate lovers are paying more than ever for Lindt bunnies, Cadbury eggs and other Easter favourites.

item.title: Government introduces bus service for Aussies stuck in Middle East
item.description: Travellers stranded by the Israel-Iran conflict may be transported to cities with open airports.

item.title: NRL master coach Wayne Bennett hands Zac Lomax a savage reality check: ‘Live with it’
item.description: ‘He’s made a choice.’

item.title: Court freezes notorious ex-minister’s hidden Sydney assets worth tens of millions
item.description: Caveats have been secured over a number of properties linked to notorious politician Eddie Obeid.

item.title: Jamie Dunn, voice of Agro the puppet, dies aged 75
item.description: The former Channel Seven talent was the mastermind behind Australia’s most popular puppets for over four decades.

item.description: ‘I’m confident we have selected the right candidate for this critical by-election.’

item.title: Barack Obama calls for Jesse Jackson's fight for justice to go on
item.description: ‘Each day, we wake up to some new assault on our democratic institutions.’

item.description: ‘We don’t need Muslim Australians treated as talking points in a political debate.’

item.description: But he vowed that Iran would not ‘unconditionally surrender’ to the US and Israel.

item.title: Ellyse Perry breaks Karen Rolton’s Test runs record as Aussies power to dominant position against India
item.description: The veteran fell short of a ton but still created history at the WACA.

item.title: Sharks’ winning formula made clear after Brayden Trindall masterclass in 50-10 mauling against Titans
item.description: Cronulla have already put up 50 points in 2026 and the key to a possible premiership charge is staring them in the face.

item.description: He made the shocking comments 14 years ago, and now he's refusing to back down.

item.description: With yet more hikes around the corner, and experts warning rationing could be just months away, authorities are calling for calm.

item.description: The Israeli attack on an oil facility appears to be the first time civil infrastructure has been targeted in the war.

item.description: The veteran was forced off early before Australia paid the price for a second-half implosion.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: US President Donald Trump hints that Cuba could be next focus after Iran
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Parents of Bondi attack victim Matilda Britvan tie the knot in bittersweet ceremony with touching tribute
item.description: The couple included a tiny yet powerful detail in their special occasion.

item.title: Man fatally stabbed during right at campground in Woolbrook, NSW
item.description: It follows the alleged axe murder of another man at a campground last week.

item.title: India banish miserable memories with ‘special’ T20 World Cup triumph
item.description: The hosts lifted the trophy as heartbroken New Zealand players cemented their status as cricket’s nearly men.

item.title: Ali Khamenei’s son Mojtaba elected as Iran’s new Supreme Leader amid war with US and Israel
item.description: The announcement brings little hope of a quick end to the conflict.

item.title: Collingwood tweak best and fairest voting after Nick Daicos controversy
item.description: Craig McRae has revealed they ‘changed the system’ to favour their golden child after last year’s gaffe.

item.title: Police intervene as protesters block bus and Iran players face up to ‘grave’ fears: ‘Let them go’
item.description: Fifteen minutes of mayhem has accelerated calls for Australia to step in and save players branded ‘traitors’ by their home country.

item.title: Sam Newman undergoes emergency surgery during 10-day hospital stint after suffering ministroke
item.description: The AFL champion spent 10 days in hospital and admits he ‘mightn’t be here’ if not for his partner’s quick thinking.

item.title: Former prince Andrew’s daughter Princess Eugenie steps down as patron for UK anti-slavery charity
item.description: The disgraced royal’s family has been under scrutiny since his arrest in February.

item.title: Cameron Hill defends first-lap move that sparked Zach Bates’ insult as Toyota GR Supra learning curve continues
item.description: The pair already have some serious history despite only sharing the track at five events.

item.title: Zac Lomax signs two-year deal with Rugby Australia and Western Force
item.description: The 26-year-old has defected to Super Rugby, effective immediately.

item.title: Kia K4, EV3, EV5, EV6, EV9, Carnival, Sorento, Sportage and Tasman recalled
item.description: More than 11,500 examples of nine Kia models – including the Tasman ute – have been recalled due to potentially faulty instrument clusters.

item.title: Queensland and Northern Territory face flood emergency amid heavy rainfall
item.description: Emergency warnings have been issued to Queensland residents to move to higher ground.

item.title: Ford rules out return of its celebrated hot hatches
item.description: Don’t hold your breath for a new hot hatch from Ford as the automaker doesn’t want to “copy the past”.

item.title: Australian share market loses $130 billion as Middle East war rocks global oil prices
item.description: Investors have fled as oil prices surge with Trump dismissing the price spike as ‘a minor cost for global safety and peace’.

item.title: Eels recruit Jonah Pezet set to cop it all over again from Broncos after Storm test: ‘We won’t change’
item.description: The 23-year-old was smashed by a former teammate and now his future teammates have promised to do the same.

item.title: You can already save up to $700 on Galaxy S26 devices
item.description: Samsung just dropped the Galaxy S26 and we’ve found the hack that can slice up to $700 off your upgrade.

item.title: Two Pixels for the price of one: find out how to secure your free Google phone
item.description: Optus customers can now score a free Pixel 9a when they sign up for any Pixel 10 mobile plan.

item.title: Volkswagen Transporter recalled
item.description: The German brand has recalled a small number of Transporter commercial vans because their headlights may not have been adjusted correctly.

item.title: 2026 MG 4 EV Urban to enter Australia's growing budget EV segment next month
item.description: MG's new, more softly styled electric hatchback is due in Australian showrooms in April, with a choice of two batteries.

item.title: Netflix and Meghan Markle: Company makes major announcement about As Ever brand
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex launched her lifestyle brand with the streaming site in 2025.

item.title: ‘Everything’s at stake’: Home and Away favourites Brax and Ricky return after a decade away
item.description: Stephen Peacocke and Bonnie Sveen dish on their highly anticipated comeback.

item.title: Family of Melbourne good Samaritan Aidan Becker pay tribute after alleged murder outside Mernda train station
item.description: Aidan Becker, 22, was allegedly stabbed to death after stepping in to protect a schoolboy from a group of four teenagers.

item.title: Jack Ginnivan slapped on the wrist by AFL after wearing ring under glove during Hawthorn’s loss to GWS
item.description: The Hawthorn forward told a rival fan to ‘have a cry’ but league officials took a dim view.

item.title: James Van Der Beek’s daughter Emilia shares brave message in emotional video
item.description: She said she still talks to him every day.

item.title: Essendon players prank Zach Merrett by giving him a signed Hawthorn jumper after failed trade request
item.description: The clever gag, which involved Jack Ginnivan, even got the tick of approval from the coach.

item.title: Toyota Kluger recalled
item.description: Almost 35,000 Toyota Klugers have been recalled because their rear seatbacks may not remain correctly locked in place.

item.title: Deepal follows BYD, Honda and Tesla in getting snagged by Australian regulation
item.description: The Deepal E07 doesn't meet a specific Australian regulation requiring the presence of three rear child seat anchor points.

item.title: ‘Heartbroken’ Aussie world champion Jai Opetaia wears IBF title belt after Zuffa win over Brandon Glanton
item.description: ‘We’re not just going to lie down and take it.’

item.title: What is ‘acid rain’ and why is it happening in Iran right now? Atmospheric scientist explains impact of US bombings
item.description: The US bombing campaign has triggered a potentially deadly ‘acid rain’ phenomenon.

item.title: Australians scramble for jerry cans as Middle East conflict stirs fuel panic buying
item.description: Bunnings have confirmed they are getting more fuel containers in due to the demand.
